# disconnectAccount

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for disconnectAccount

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useDisconnectAccountMutation(); mutate({ input: { accountId: '<UUID>' } });
```

## Examples

### Use useDisconnectAccountMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useDisconnectAccountMutation();
mutate({ input: { accountId: '<UUID>' } });
```
